Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-31 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC dominates today's momentum rankings with a score of 95.2 and the #1 rank, displaying exceptional long-term performance across all timeframes—notably a 1502% return over 10 years and 501% over 5 years, significantly outpacing SPY by 1288 percentage points over the decade. The ticker shows clean momentum mechanics with all four moving averages in bullish alignment, a strong_buy signal, and consistent acceleration in gains at each interval (3m/1m ratio of 6.07 down to more measured 5y/1y ratio of 3.15). CLMT ranks second with similar strength in near-term returns (175% 1-year, 523% 5-year) but displays a critical structural weakness: a catastrophic 10-year return of only 168% paired with a negative 46% underperformance versus SPY over that same period, suggesting recent momentum masks longer-term underperformance or a fundamental business shift. Both tickers pass all moving average tests and show outperformance versus SPY in the 1y and 5y windows, but LINC's sustained multi-decade growth trajectory contrasts sharply with CLMT's deteriorating decade-long record, explaining the significant score separation despite comparable recent years.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
